SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.version

Class AIcCustomVersionScheme

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AIcCustomVersionScheme
All Implemented Interfaces:
eu.algites.lib.common.enums.AIiEnumItem, AIiVersionScheme, Serializable
public final class AIcCustomVersionScheme extends Object implements AIiVersionScheme, Serializable

Title: AIcCustomVersionScheme

Description: Simple reusable implementation of AIiVersionScheme.

This class exists to make it trivial to introduce a new version scheme without changing an enum. You can use it in production code (for registries/configuration) as well as in tests.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form
Date:
26.01.26
